x.title: I had chronic pain for most of my life until a doctor did an MRI of the pain source and found a congenital condition tha
x.summary: I had chronic pain for most of my life until a doctor did an MRI of the pain source and found a congenital condition that was then fixed with surgery. Now I'm wondering if I had 30+ years of pain because doctors worried I was too stupid to be in the presence of scan results.
